hero_subtitle: SFTY connects company registry checks with KYB workflows to support VASPs in conducting audit-ready counterparty due diligence and maintaining traceable onboarding evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Company registry checks remain disconnected and manual
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to verify company registration data due to fragmented provider outputs and siloed workflows. This causes slower counterparty due diligence, inconsistent risk assessment and weak audit trails for onboarding decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates company registry data, KYC and KYB provider outputs, sanctions and PEP screening into a unified onboarding workflow that streamlines risk review and preserves audit-ready evidence.
workflow_title: From company registry checks to approval
workflow_description: SFTY connects company registry and KYB provider checks through risk review, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation into one onboarding workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond registry checks. Review-ready onboarding evidence
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider results into structured workflows, cases, decisions and evidence that support traceable, auditable onboarding and counterparty due diligence.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured onboarding, connecting company registry data and due diligence into a controlled, audit-ready compliance workflow for regulated environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for company registry checks?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects company registry data and KYB provider outputs into structured onboarding workflows for regulated digital asset businesses, supporting due diligence and counterparty verification.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure onboarding workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes registry checks, UBO reviews and sanctions screening results into connected risk-based onboarding processes with case creation, decision logs and escalation workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence packages including decision logs, provider outputs and internal notes to support onboarding review and regulatory audit readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYB and KYC providers, aggregating their outputs into a single, auditable compliance operating layer without disrupting existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYC and KYB providers, turning their outputs into structured workflows and evidence without replacing the underlying checks or providers.
final_title: Structure company registry checks into onboarding workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects registry data with KYB outputs, risk-based routing and audit-ready evidence for VASP onboarding.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
